cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.25)

add_library(passenger_terminal-qt-models
    models/passenger_model.hpp
    models/passenger_model.cpp
    models/gate_model.hpp
    models/gate_model.cpp
    models/boarding_pass_model.hpp
    models/boarding_pass_model.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(passenger_terminal-qt-models PUBLIC
    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Gui
)

add_library(passenger_terminal-qt-widgets
    widgets/passenger_list_widget.hpp
    widgets/passenger_list_widget.cpp
    widgets/passenger_edit_dialog.hpp
    widgets/passenger_edit_dialog.cpp
    widgets/gate_list_widget.hpp
    widgets/gate_list_widget.cpp
    widgets/gate_edit_dialog.hpp
    widgets/gate_edit_dialog.cpp
    widgets/boarding_pass_list_widget.hpp
    widgets/boarding_pass_list_widget.cpp
    widgets/boarding_pass_edit_dialog.hpp
    widgets/boarding_pass_edit_dialog.cpp
)

target_link_libraries(passenger_terminal-qt-widgets PUBLIC
    passenger_terminal-qt-models
    Qt6::Core
    Qt6::Gui
    Qt6::Widgets
)
